# Dr. Detail

> Premium auto detailing studio in Fargo, North Dakota. Shop-only (drop-off): interior detailing, exterior wash & wax, full details, ceramic coating, headlight restoration.

## Business
- Name: Dr. Detail
- Location: 4402 27th St N, Fargo, ND 58102
- Phone: (218) 443-5842
- Hours: Mon-Fri 8am-6pm, Sat 9am-4pm, Sun closed
- Serving: Fargo, West Fargo, Moorhead, Dilworth, Horace

## Services
- [Interior Detailing](https://drdetail.vercel.app/services/interior-detailing/) (from $129)
- [Exterior Wash & Wax](https://drdetail.vercel.app/services/exterior-detailing/) (from $89)
- [Full Detail](https://drdetail.vercel.app/services/full-detail/) (from $229)
- [Ceramic Coating](https://drdetail.vercel.app/services/ceramic-coating/) (from $350)
- [Headlight Restoration](https://drdetail.vercel.app/services/headlight-restoration/) (from $79)

## Memberships (Detail Club)
Monthly maintenance memberships, month-to-month with no contract. New members start with a one-time Full Detail to bring the vehicle to baseline.
- Maintenance ($89/month): one maintenance detail per month, exterior hand wash + spray-wax sealant, wheels/tires, interior vacuum + wipe-down, priority booking, 10% off add-ons.
- Signature ($149/month): one full maintenance detail per month (adds interior steam, leather conditioning, clay bar + wax, free interior add-ons), 15% off full details/ceramic/headlights.
